name: goal-driven
description: Contract-first dual-skill package that turns ambiguous requests into canonical Goal Contracts.

interface.longDescription: Goal-Driven is the normal user-facing entrypoint for turning ambiguous work into a canonical Goal Contract with goal, scope, success_criteria, evidence, and guardrails. Install it through Codex Marketplace as a plugin, or with npx skills for lightweight skill distribution. The package also includes the paired goal-contract-verifier skill for runtimes that want isolated verification against current progress, evidence, and blockers.
defaultPrompt: Use goal-driven to turn this request into a Goal Contract: <your request>
Use $goal-driven to clarify the goal, scope, success criteria, evidence, and guardrails for this task.
Keep the contract canonical and execution-neutral.
Do not add runtime verifier workflow, host routing, or downstream planning metadata to the contract body.
